summary: Bug Fix Verified - 'Scegli' (Choose) button in actor casting screen now works correctly. The fix in FilmPopup.jsx (lines 493-515) ensures actorRoles defaults to 'Supporto' when not explicitly set, preventing the selectCast function from silently failing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified in FilmPopup.jsx lines 493-498: selectCast function now auto-assigns 'Supporto' role if actorRoles[proposalId] is not set
Backend POST /api/film-pipeline/{project_id}/select-cast correctly handles actor_role field with default 'Supporto'
Actor role dropdown defaults to empty ('Ruolo...') in UI but backend accepts null/undefined and defaults to 'Supporto'
All cast selection flows working: directors, screenwriters, actors, composers
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with film in casting status (project_id: 7b6c9535-ba50-4321-ad73-e29769c401e9)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Scegli' button bug is fixed. Test user has film 'Il Grande Mistero' in casting status with all roles filled (director, screenwriter, composer, 4 actors). The casting is complete and ready to advance to screenplay phase.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/film-pipeline/casting: PASS - Returns films in casting status with cast_proposals

frontend_ui_tests.open_casting_popup: PASS - Clicking film card opens FilmPopup
frontend_ui_tests.expand_attori_section: PASS - Actors section expands showing proposals
frontend_ui_tests.scegli_button_visible: PASS - 'Scegli' buttons visible for each actor proposal
frontend_ui_tests.success_toast_appears: PASS - 'Casting completo!' toast shown after selection
frontend_ui_tests.cast_updates_correctly: PASS - Selected actors appear in cast with correct role_in_film

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Clicking 'Scegli' button in actor casting screen did nothing - silently failing
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: selectCast function in FilmPopup.jsx was returning early because actorRoles[proposalId] was undefined when no role was explicitly selected
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Default role set to 'Supporto' in selectCast function (line 496-497): if (!actorRoles[proposalId]) setActorRoles(p => ({...p, [proposalId]: 'Supporto'}))
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend API tests + Playwright UI tests
